data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of capturing close-won/close-lost reasons, which is explicitly stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any information or data points that confirm the implementation or functionality of this requirement. The absence of evidence regarding the capture of close-won/close-lost reasons indicates a clear gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence of close-won/close-lost reason capture.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
